tasks.label: mp-spdz: up (3 parties)
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --build party0 party1 party2

tasks.label: mp-spdz: compile (current file)
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T party0 bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p /mp-spdz/Programs/Source; cp -f "/workspace/${relativeFile}" "/mp-spdz/Programs/Source/${fileBasename}"; cd /mp-spdz; python3 ./compile.py "${fileBasenameNoExtension}"'

tasks.label: mp-spdz: run mascot party0 (current program)
tasks.command: docker compose exec party0 bash -lc 'cd /mp-spdz && ./mascot-party.x -N 3 -p 0 -ip Config/IPs -IF Inputs/Input "${fileBasenameNoExtension}"'

tasks.label: mp-spdz: run mascot party1 (current program)
tasks.command: docker compose exec party1 bash -lc 'cd /mp-spdz && ./mascot-party.x -N 3 -p 1 -ip Config/IPs -IF Inputs/Input "${fileBasenameNoExtension}"'

tasks.label: mp-spdz: run mascot party2 (current program)
tasks.command: docker compose exec party2 bash -lc 'cd /mp-spdz && ./mascot-party.x -N 3 -p 2 -ip Config/IPs -IF Inputs/Input "${fileBasenameNoExtension}"'
